text.title: Mistake Memory Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure for applying Mistake Memory. Each step lists input, action, and output. Pause and surface the artefact when output is produced.

step.name: capture-immediately
step.action: Within 30 min, draft entry with severity + what-happened.

step.name: write-concrete-prevention
step.action: Name one CI rule, lint rule, or process change.

step.name: inject-and-track-occurrence
step.action: Load relevant mistakes pre-task; bump occurrence_count on recurrence; create CI rule on 2nd.

decision-gate.p: After the final step, the artefact MUST satisfy the output contract in content/02-output-contract.xml before downstream consumers read it.
